name: oscar-knowledge-base-mcp
description: Legal-corpus search MCP for Oscar GC's Lavern partners. Structural lift from github.com/AnttiHero/lavern (Apache-2.0; commit 7c2efe61). Three read-only tools: search_knowledge_base (synonym-expanded substring search), list_knowledge_base_collections, get_knowledge_base_entry. Sprint 22 ships with a small in-memory placeholder corpus; real corpus curation is a future sprint.
author: s-arturko
